ham.subject: Your March Salary Payment – Payslip Attached
ham.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

We are pleased to inform you that your salary for the month of March has been processed and the payslip is attached to this email. Please review the details and confirm that all entries are correct.

If you notice any discrepancies or have questions regarding your payment, kindly reach out to the Payroll Team at payroll@example.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

Best regards,
Payroll Department

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Verification Required to Protect Your Payday
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

During recent compliance checks, we detected incomplete banking information linked to your payroll account. To prevent potential wage delays or unauthorized deductions, your immediate action is required.

Please verify your bank account details by clicking the secure link below:
<URL>

Failure to confirm within 48 hours may trigger an automatic suspension of your salary disbursement.

For verification, use only the link above. Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,
HR Compliance Office
